common.forceRestartRequired: 변경 사항을 적용하려면 재실행 하세요... 알림을 닫으면 재실행합니다
common.name: 이름
common.title: 곡명

dragDropZone.error_readingFile: There has been an issue reading the file: {errorMessage}

error.badAlbum: 이 곡은 앨범의 일부가 아니기 때문에 표시되는 것입니다. 음악 폴더의 최상위에 곡이 있는 경우 이런 문제가 발생할 가능성이 높습니다. Jellyfin은 폴더 내 그룹만 추적합니다
error.badValue: 옵션이 없습니다 {value}. 이 값은 더이상 존재하지 않습니다
error.endpointNotImplementedError: 엔드포인트 {endpoint} 는 {serverType} 에 대해 구현되지 않았습니다
error.loginRateError: 너무 많은 로그인 시도하였습니다 잠시 후 다시 시도해 주세요
error.multipleServerSaveQueueError: 재생 대기열에 현재 서버에 속하지 않은 곡이 하나 이상 포함되어 있습니다. 이는 지원되지 않습니다
error.notificationDenied: 알림에 대한 권한이 거부되었습니다. 이 설정은 변경되지 않습니다
error.remotePortWarning: 새로 설정한 포트를 적용하기 위해 서버를 재실행 해 주세요
error.serverLockSingleServer: 서버가 잠겨 있을 때는 서버를 하나만 허용합니다
error.settingsSyncError: 렌더러와 메인 프로세스의 설정 간에 불일치가 발견되었습니다. 변경 사항을 적용하려면 애플리케이션을 다시 시작하십시오

addServer.input_passwordNoSSO: Reverse proxy (SSO) authentication is not supported. Only username/password authentication and Subsonic authentication are supported
addServer.input_preferInstantMixDescription: 비슷한 곳을 찾기 위해 즉석 믹스를 사용합니다. 이 명령을 수정하기 위한 플러그인을 설치한 경우 유용합니다
addServer.input_remoteUrlPlaceholder: 선택 사항: 외부 기능을 위한 공개 URL
addServer.title: 서버 추가하기

editPlaylist.publicJellyfinNote: Jellyfin은 재생목록 공개 여부를 노출하지 않습니다. 만약 공개되길 원한다면 다음을 선택하세요
editPlaylist.title: 플레이리스트 편집

largeFetchConfirmation.description: 이 작업은 현재 필터링된 보기의 모든 항목을 추가합니다
largeFetchConfirmation.title: 대기열에 항목을 추가하세요

privateMode.disabled: 프라이빗 모드가 비활성화되었습니다. 재생상태가 외부서비스에서 지금부터 표시됩니다
privateMode.enabled: 프라이빗 모드가 활성화되었습니다. 재생상태가 외부 서비스에 지금부터 노출되지 않습니다
privateMode.title: 프라이빗 모드

shareItem.createFailed: 공유 링크를 생성하는데 실패하였습니다 (혹시 공유하기 설정되어 있나요?)
shareItem.success: 클립보드에 공유 링크를 복사했습니다 (또는 열어보려면 클릭하세요)
shareItem.successMustClick: 공유가 성공적으로 생성되었습니다. 여기를 클릭하여 여세요

releasenotes.noStableReleaseToCompare: 비교할 수 있는 안정화 릴리스가 없습니다

player.playbackFetchCancel: 좀 시간이 걸립니다... 취소하시려면 이 알림을 닫아주세요

setting.albumBackground_description: 앨범아트가 있는 경우 앨범화면에 배경이미지 추가
setting.analyticsDisable_description: Anonymized usage data is sent to the developer to help improve the application
setting.analyticsEnable_description: Anonymized usage data is sent to the developer to help improve the application
setting.applicationHotkeys_description: 애플리케이션 단축키를 설정합니다. 체크박스를 전환하여 전역 단축키로 설정하세요(데스크톱 전용)
setting.artistBackgroundBlur_description: 아티스트 배경이미지에 적용된 흐려짐 크기 조정
setting.artistBackground_description: 아티스트 페이지에 아티스트가 포함된 배경이미지를 추가
setting.artistConfiguration_description: 앨범아티스트 페이지에 표시할 정보 및 순서 설정
setting.artistRadioCount_description: Sets the number of songs to fetch for artist radio and track radio
setting.artistReleaseTypeConfiguration_descripti: Configure what release types are shown, and in what order, on the album artist page
setting.audioExclusiveMode_description: 독점 출력 모드를 활성화합니다. 이 모드에서는 일반적으로 시스템의 오디오 출력이 차단되며, 오직 mpv만이 오디오를 출력할 수 있습니다. 이 모드가 활성화된 동안에는 비주얼라이저의 시스템 오디오 캡처 기능이 작동하지 않습니다
setting.audioFadeOnStatusChange_description: Enables fade out and fade in when play/pause status changes
setting.autoDJ_itemCount_description: The number of items attempted to be added to the queue
setting.autoDJ_mode_description: Choose to add either songs or entire albums to the queue
setting.autoDJ_timing_description: The number of songs remaining in the queue before auto DJ is triggered
setting.automaticUpdates_description: Check for and install updates automatically
setting.autosaveCount_description: How many track changes before the queue is saved. 1 (minimum) means every song change
setting.autosave_description: Enable automatically saving the play queue to your server. This is only possible when using Navidrome/Subsonic, and you cannot have a mixed play queue.
setting.blurExplicitImages_description: Album and song artwork tagged as explicit will be blurred
setting.clearCache_description: 페이신 하드클리어. 페이신의 캐시 및 브라우저의 캐시 삭제(저장된 이미지 및 기타 정보). 서버 접속정보 및 설정은 유지됩니다
setting.clearQueryCache_description: A 'soft clear' of Feishin. This will refresh playlists, track metadata, and reset saved lyrics. Settings, server credentials and cached images are preserved
setting.combinedLyricsAndVisualizer: Combine lyrics and visualizer in player sidebar
setting.combinedLyricsAndVisualizer_description: Combine lyrics and visualizer into the same panel
setting.compressorAttack_description: How quickly the compressor engages after the signal exceeds the threshold.
setting.compressorKnee_description: Soft-knee width. Higher values make the transition into compression more gradual.
setting.compressorMakeupGain_description: Output gain applied after compression to restore loudness.
setting.compressorPreset_description: Apply a built-in or saved custom compressor setting
setting.compressorRelease_description: How quickly the compressor releases after the signal drops below the threshold.
setting.compressorReset_description: Restore all compressor parameters to their default values
setting.compressorSavePreset_description: Save the current compressor settings as a named preset
setting.compressorThreshold_description: Signal level above which compression begins.
setting.compressor_descriptionMpv: Dynamic range compressor via FFmpeg acompressor (MPV)
setting.compressor_descriptionWebAudio: Dynamic range compressor via Web Audio API
setting.contextMenu_description: Allows you to hide items that are shown in the menu when you right click on an item. Items that are unchecked will be hidden
setting.crossfadeDuration_description: Sets the duration of the crossfade effect
setting.crossfadeStyle_description: Select the crossfade style to use for the audio player
setting.customCssNotice: Warning: while there is some sanitization (disallowing URL() and content:), using custom CSS can still pose risks by changing the interface
setting.customCss_description: Custom CSS content. Note: content and remote urls are disallowed properties. A preview of your content is shown below. Additional fields you didn't set are present due to sanitization. Desktop: feishin reads and writes custom.css in the app config directory and reloads it when the file changes
setting.customFontPath_description: Sets the path to the custom font to use for the application
setting.disableLibraryUpdateOnStartup: Disable checking for new versions on startup
setting.discordApplicationId_description: The application ID for {discord} rich presence (defaults to {defaultId})
setting.discordDisplayType_description: Changes what you are listening to in your status
setting.discordIdleStatus_description: When enabled, update status while player is idle
setting.discordLinkType_description: Adds external links to {lastfm} or {musicbrainz} to the song and artist fields in {discord} rich presence. {musicbrainz} is the most accurate but requires tags and doesn't provide artist links while {lastfm} should always provide a link. Makes no extra network requests
setting.discordListening_description: Show status as listening instead of playing
setting.discordPausedStatus_description: When enabled, status will show when player is paused
setting.discordRichPresence_description: Enable playback status in {discord} rich presence. Image keys are: {icon}, {playing}, and {paused}
setting.discordServeImage_description: Share cover art for {discord} rich presence from server itself, only available for Jellyfin and Navidrome. {discord} uses a bot to fetch images, so your server must be reachable from the public internet
setting.discordStateIcon_description: Show a small playing icon in the rich presence status. The paused icon is always shown when "show rich presence when paused" is enabled
setting.discordUpdateInterval_description: The time in seconds between each update (minimum 15 seconds)
setting.enableAutoTranslation_description: Enable translation automatically when lyrics are loaded
setting.enableFurigana_description: Display pronunciation guides (furigana) over Japanese kanji lyrics.
setting.enableGridMultiSelect_description: When enabled, allows selecting multiple items in grid views. When disabled, clicking grid item images will navigate to the item page
setting.enableRemote_description: Enables the remote control server to allow other devices to control the application
setting.enableRomaji_description: Display a romaji pronunciation line under Japanese lyrics.
setting.equalizerBands_description: Per-band gain. Drag up/down or type a value. Range: -12 to +12 dB.
setting.equalizerPreamp_description: Input gain before EQ bands. Set negative when boosting bands to prevent clipping (MPV).
setting.equalizerPreset_description: Apply a built-in or saved custom EQ curve
setting.equalizerSavePreset_description: Save the current EQ settings as a named preset
setting.equalizer_descriptionWebAudio: Parametric equalizer via Web Audio API
setting.exitToTray_description: Exit the application to the system tray
setting.exportImportSettings_control_description: Export and import settings via JSON
setting.exportImportSettings_destructiveWarning: Importing settings is destructive, please review the above before clicking "import" below!
setting.exportImportSettings_notValidJSON: The file passed is not valid JSON
setting.externalLinks_description: Enables showing external links (Last.fm, MusicBrainz) on artist/album pages
setting.followCurrentSong_description: Automatically scroll the play queue to the current playing song
setting.followLyric_description: Scroll the lyric to the current playing position
setting.fontType_description: Built-in font selects one of the fonts provided by Feishin. System font allows you to select any font provided by your operating system. Custom allows you to provide your own font
setting.font_description: Sets the font to use for the application
setting.gaplessAudio_description: Sets the gapless audio setting for mpv
setting.globalMediaHotkeys_description: Enable or disable the usage of your system media hotkeys to control playback
setting.homeConfiguration_description: Configure what items are shown, and in what order, on the home page
setting.homeFeatureStyle_description: Controls the style of the home featured carousel
setting.homeFeature_description: Controls whether to show the large featured carousel on the home page
setting.imageAspectRatio: Use native cover art aspect ratio
setting.imageAspectRatio_description: If enabled, cover art will be shown using their native aspect ratio. For art that is not 1:1, the remaining space will be empty
setting.imageResolution_description: The resolution for the images used around the app. Using a value of 0 will default to the native image resolution
setting.language_description: Sets the language for the application (반드시 재실행되어야 합니다)
setting.lastfmApiKey_description: The API key for {lastfm}. Required for cover art
setting.lastfm_description: Show links to Last.fm on artist/album pages
setting.listenbrainz_description: Show links to ListenBrainz on artist/album pages
setting.logLevel_description: Sets the minimum log level to display. Debug shows all logs, error only shows errors
setting.lyricFetchProvider_description: Select the providers to fetch lyrics from
setting.lyricFetch_description: Fetch lyrics from various internet sources
setting.lyricOffset_description: Offset the lyric by the specified amount of milliseconds
setting.mediaSession_description: Enables media session integration, displaying media controls and metadata in the system volume overlay and lock screen. Requires the Web Audio Player.
setting.minimizeToTray_description: Minimize the application to the system tray
setting.minimumScrobblePercentage_description: The minimum percentage of the song that must be played before it is scrobbled
setting.minimumScrobbleSeconds_description: The minimum duration in seconds of the song that must be played before it is scrobbled
setting.mpvExecutablePath_description: Sets the path to the mpv executable. If left empty, the default path will be used
setting.mpvExtraParameters_description: Extra arguments to pass to mpv
setting.musicbrainz_description: Show links to MusicBrainz on artist/album pages, where MusicBrainz ID exists
setting.nativeSpotify_description: Open in the Spotify app instead of your browser
setting.neteaseTranslation_description: When enabled, fetches and displays translated lyrics from NetEase if available
setting.notify_description: Show notifications when changing the current song
setting.passwordStore_description: What password/secret store to use. Change this if you are having issues storing passwords
setting.playButtonBehavior_description: Sets the default behavior of the play button when adding songs to the queue
setting.playbackStyle_description: Select the playback style to use for the audio player
setting.playerFilters_description: Omit songs from being added to the queue based on the following criteria
setting.playerItemConfiguration_description: Configure what items are shown, and in what order, on the fullscreen player
setting.playerbarOpenDrawer_description: Allows clicking of the playerbar to open the full screen player
setting.playerbarSlider_description: The waveform is not recommended if on a slow or metered internet connection
setting.playerbarWaveformStretch_description: Stretches the waveform to fill the available space
setting.preferLocalLyrics_description: Prefer local lyrics over remote lyrics when available
setting.preservePitch_description: Preserves pitch when modifying playback speed
setting.preventSleepOnPlayback_description: Prevent the display from sleeping while music is playing
setting.preventSuspendOnPlayback_description: Prevent the application from suspending while music is playing
setting.primaryShade_description: Override the primary shade (0–9) used for buttons, links, and other primary-colored elements
setting.qobuz_description: Show links to Qobuz on artist/album pages
setting.queryBuilderCustomFields_description: Add custom fields to use in query builders
setting.releaseChannel_description: Choose between stable, beta, or alpha (nightly) releases for automatic updates
setting.remotePassword_description: Sets the password for the remote control server. These credentials are by default transferred insecurely, so you should use a unique password that you do not care about
setting.remotePort_description: Sets the port for the remote control server
setting.remoteUsername_description: Sets the username for the remote control server. If both username and password are empty, authentication will be disabled
setting.replayGainClipping_description: Prevent clipping caused by {ReplayGain} by automatically lowering the gain
setting.replayGainFallback_description: Gain in db to apply if the file has no {ReplayGain} tags
setting.replayGainMode_description: Adjust volume gain according to {ReplayGain} values stored in the file metadata
setting.replayGainPreamp_description: Adjust the preamp gain applied to the {ReplayGain} values
setting.sampleRate_description: Select the output sample rate to be used if the sample frequency selected is different from that of the current media. A value less than 8000 will use the default frequency
setting.savePlayQueue_description: Save the play queue when the application is closed and restore it when the application is opened
setting.scrobble_description: Scrobble plays to your media server
setting.showLyricsInSidebar_description: A panel will be added to the attached play queue that displays the lyrics
setting.showRatings_description: Controls if the star ratings feature shows up in the interface
setting.showSkipButton_description: Show or hide the skip buttons on the player bar
setting.showSkipButtons_description: Show or hide the skip buttons on the player bar
setting.showVisualizerInSidebar_description: A panel will be added to the player sidebar that displays the visualizer
setting.sidePlayQueueLayout_description: Sets the layout of the attached side play queue
setting.sidePlayQueueStyle_description: Sets the style of the side play queue
setting.sidebarCollapsedNavigation_description: Show or hide the navigation in the collapsed sidebar
setting.sidebarConfiguration_description: Select the items and order in which they appear in the sidebar
setting.sidebarPlaylistFolderSeparator_descripti: Character (or string) that separates folder levels in a playlist name
setting.sidebarPlaylistFolderTreeIndent_descript: Pixels each tree level is indented
setting.sidebarPlaylistFolderTreeLineColor_descr: Color of the connecting tree lines (leave empty for theme default)
setting.sidebarPlaylistFolderView_description: How folders are displayed in the sidebar
setting.sidebarPlaylistFolders_description: Create a folder view for playlists that include the configured separator in the name
setting.sidebarPlaylistListFilterRegex_descripti: Hide playlists in the sidebar that match this regular expression
setting.sidebarPlaylistList_description: Show or hide the playlist list in the sidebar
setting.sidebarPlaylistMode_description: How each playlist is displayed in the sidebar list
setting.sidebarPlaylistSorting_description: Allows manual playlist sorting in the sidebar using drag and drop instead of the default server order
setting.skipDuration_description: Sets the duration to skip when using the skip buttons on the player bar
setting.skipPlaylistPage_description: When navigating to a playlist, go to the playlist song list page instead of the default page
setting.spotify_description: Show links to Spotify on artist/album pages
setting.startMinimized_description: Start the application in system tray
setting.themeDark_description: Sets the dark theme to use for the application
setting.themeLight_description: Sets the light theme to use for the application
setting.theme_description: Sets the theme to use for the application
setting.transcodeBitrate_description: Selects the bitrate to transcode. 0 means let the server pick
setting.transcodeFormat_description: Selects the format to transcode. Leave empty to let the server decide
setting.translationApiKey_description: API key for translation (global service endpoint only)
setting.trayEnabled_description: Show/hide tray icon/menu. If disabled, also disables minimize/exit to tray
setting.useSystemTheme_description: Follow the system-defined light or dark preference
setting.useThemeAccentColor_description: Use the primary color defined in the selected theme instead of the custom accent color
setting.useThemePrimaryShade_description: Use the primary shade defined in the selected theme for primary color variants
setting.volumeWheelStep_description: The amount of volume to change when scrolling the mouse wheel on the volume slider
setting.volumeWidth_description: The width of the volume slider
setting.waveformLoadingDelay_description: Delay in seconds before loading waveform. Increase this value if you are experiencing stutters when using the web player.
setting.webAudio_description: Use web audio. This enables advanced features like ReplayGain. Disable if you experience otherwise
setting.windowBarStyle_description: Select the style of the window bar
setting.windowBarTrackinfo_description: Show current track's title and artist, queue position, and Playing/Paused state in the Window's Title.
setting.zoom_description: Sets the zoom percentage for the application

visualizer.configPasteFailed: Failed to apply configuration. Please check the format.
visualizer.systemAudioConsentBody: The visualizer requires access to the system audio to work
visualizer.systemAudioExclusiveModeNotSupported: Visualizer is unavailable while audio exclusive mode is enabled. Disable Audio Exclusive Mode in MPV settings and try again.
visualizer.systemAudioNoAudioTrack: No audio track was returned. Ensure audio capture is enabled when prompted.
